manifest.name: Auto Tag Graph Colors

name: Auto Tag Graph Colors

releases.author: Trisko06
releases.description:
Initial release of Auto Tag Graph Colors.

**Features**
- Automatic, stable color assignment for every tag
- 6 palettes: modern, pastel, high-contrast, dark-mode, colorblind-friendly (Wong 2011), HSL golden-angle
- 3 color modes: primary / priority / multi
- Smart tag blending — per-note colors derived from full tag set
- Monochrome sub-mode — variations of a single chosen hue
- Heat coloring by connection count (percentile-ranked)
- Collapsible legend overlay with per-tag color pickers
- Locks, per-tag manual overrides, priority tags, excluded tags
- Real-time updates when tags change
- Clean uninstall — removes only the color groups this plugin created

**Install**
Drop `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/auto-tag-graph-colors/` and enable in Community plugins.
